title: YouTuber sued by Ontario Tech University after allegedly throwing curry at students during prank
summary_full: Ontario Tech University is suing YouTuber Fique Ayub for allegedly disrupting classes and throwing curry at students during prank videos filmed on campus. The university claims Ayub entered lecture halls without permission, cooked curry, and initiated a "catch the curry" game, causing damage and distress. Ayub denies the allegations, stating his videos are exaggerated comedy and satire.
